claim: DeepSeek R1 is an open-source reasoning LLM that performs comparably to or better than OpenAI's proprietary models for coding
actionable: Evaluate DeepSeek R1 for your coding projects as a potential open-source alternative to proprietary reasoning models
source_title: Let's Settle the o3-mini Vs. R1 Debate for Coding ONCE and for ALL

claim: OpenAI released o3-mini shortly after R1 as their next-generation reasoning model to compete with open-source alternatives
actionable: Track model release cycles - when major open-source models appear, expect rapid competitive responses from proprietary vendors
source_title: Let's Settle the o3-mini Vs. R1 Debate for Coding ONCE and for ALL

claim: Bolt.diy is an open-source AI coding assistant that can be used to compare different reasoning models on real coding tasks
actionable: Use bolt.diy to deploy and test different LLMs side-by-side on actual web development tasks
source_title: Let's Settle the o3-mini Vs. R1 Debate for Coding ONCE and for ALL
